name: ES8156
description: The `es8156` platform allows your ESPHome devices to use the ES8156 low power mono audio codec. This allows the playback of audio via the microcontroller from a range of sources via [Speaker](https://esphome.io/components/speaker/) or [Media Player](https://esphome.io/components/media_player/).

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the driver. Defaults to `0x18`.

config_entries.label: I2C ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the [I²C bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) the ES8156 is connected to.
